ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Sweeney for Jonathan Sweeney.

The Court stated that is has no problem with the disclaimer filed by the Niece in Virginia, that no one was here to object and approved the First and Final Account (subject to review of a revised order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
